package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceMethodReturnsGormDbOrSqlRows() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_returns_gorm_db_or_sql_rows"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services that leak ORM or driver primitives upward instead of returning business results."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
